:large_green_circle: *OpenAI Launches GPT-5 with Real-Time Reasoning*
Relevance: 96/100 | 14 sources
OpenAI's latest model introduces chain-of-thought reasoning at inference time, marking a significant leap in AI capabilities. Early benchmarks show 40% improvement on complex reasoning tasks.

:large_green_circle: *YC W26 Batch Signals AI Infrastructure Boom*
Relevance: 91/100 | 9 sources
Y Combinator's Winter 2026 batch is 68% AI-focused, with a notable shift toward infrastructure and tooling over application-layer startups.

:large_yellow_circle: *EU AI Act Enforcement Begins with First Fines*
Relevance: 78/100 | 7 sources
The European Union has issued its first enforcement actions under the AI Act, fining two companies for non-compliance with transparency requirements.

elements.text: :newspaper: *Sources:* TechCrunch, Hacker News, ArXiv, The Verge, Wired, Reuters, Bloomberg, MIT Tech Review
